variants.description: Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Applies a quarter-reference dctrl3 step instead of the required half-reference step.
Subtracts the dctrl2 control step instead of adding it to the residue.
Omits the dctrl1 one-eighth residue increment.
L2 CDAC 4b Residue: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
